sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3495" key="a)krito/dakrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρῐτό-δακρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n3495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shedding floods of tears</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Τάνταλος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.235</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
